name: @prism-d1/cli
description: PRISM D1 Velocity CLI — AI development lifecycle assessment tool
author: andklee

scripts.build: npx tsc && mkdir -p dist/assets/infra && cp -r ../bootstrapper/metric-hooks ../bootstrapper/eval-harness ../bootstrapper/github-workflows dist/assets/ && cp -r ../infra/bin ../infra/lib ../infra/package.json ../infra/tsconfig.json ../infra/cdk.json dist/assets/infra/
